6265.notes: Good fallback logic with xp→xp_gained and gold_pieces→gold mapping. Clean conditional with explicit is not None check. Misleading 'passthrough' terminology (not actually passthrough). Type annotations present. E2E test added.

6261.notes: Excellent DefensiveNumericConverter class with robust handling of messy formats. Comprehensive unit tests for edge cases. Clean separation of concerns. Fallback chain is well-designed. Minor docs gap in the class docstring.

6245.notes: Good unified extract_character_xp(). Fixed xp_from_combat with explicit is not None check. State flag widening done correctly. Some duplication in game_state.py remains. Tests for state flags but missing edge case coverage.

6243.notes: Clean widening of state flag semantics. Excellent isinstance check avoids bool/int confusion. Comprehensive tests for acceptance/rejection. Good explicit type handling. Minor docs gap.

6269.notes: Good CR fallback logic chain. Fixed set +/-e errors. Cleaned up CR filter. Significant whitespace regex fix. Shell-specific: tests not applicable, but overall structure is sound.
